response.overview: In some cases, accounts may be temporarily +1-662-344-5077 locked due to multiple failed login attempts or suspicious activity detected by the platform’s security system. If this happens, the best course of action is +1-662-344-5077 to wait for a short period and try again, or proceed with the password recovery option. +1-662-344-5077 You should also check your email inbox for any messages from Paypal regarding account security alerts or required actions.
